status: M36 T1 SHIPPED 2026-04-21 (commit 52ac886 — 'feat(m36-t1): M36 T1 — capability taxonomy enum + shared-types scaffold', ledger 491d862). packages/shared-types/src/capabilities.ts NEW (148 LOC): CapabilityCategory 6-literal union, CAPABILITY_CATEGORIES readonly array, CAPABILITY_CATEGORY_MAP 6-key record `as const satisfies Record<CapabilityCategory, readonly string[]>` with all 41 locked §5.1 strings in category-declaration order (engineering 10 / product 7 / design 5 / operations 7 / strategy 6 / support 6), Capability string-literal union derived from map via indexed-access type (single authoring surface — no dual-source drift), CAPABILITY_LIST flattened readonly array, isCapability(unknown) O(1) type guard backed by module-local Set. packages/shared-types/src/capabilities.test.ts NEW (162 LOC, 18 tests — 3 above the ~15 estimate): shape invariants (41-entry count, no duplicates, lowercase-snake_case regex), category invariants (6 categories in declaration order, per-category counts pinning §5.1 verbatim), map ↔ list bidirectional consistency (flatten equals list, no cross-category leakage), pinned literal spot-check (12 representative strings across all 6 categories), isCapability happy path (every CAPABILITY_LIST entry returns true) + rejection paths (unknown strings, mixed case, hyphens, abbreviations, whitespace, empty string, 10 non-string values), type-level narrowing proof. packages/shared-types/src/index.ts MODIFIED (+1 line: './capabilities.js' export). Verification: vitest 24/24 pass in shared-types (was 6/6); full-repo typecheck clean across 6 packages; biome 0 errors on 3 touched files. unitTests 1169 → 1187 (+18). Zero IPC / zero bus events / zero migrations / zero settings keys — additive-only per M36 non-goals §2. Head-of-queue advances to M36 T2 (role-schema parser extension: capabilities field validation with zero-capability hard-error, unknown-capability hard-error, duplicate dedup + warning, missing-field policy by pack source per §5.4). Atomic + ledger commit cadence preserved.

notes: PHASE 5.5 HOTFIX SHIPPED (2026-04-17). Supersedes the version-bump argument in the 'M36 T2+T3+ PREWORK DISCOVERIES' note below: pack.json bumped 0.1.0 → 1.0.0 (NOT 0.2.0 as the prework note argued). Reasoning override: the prework note framed M36 as a semver-minor additive event, but the actual hotfix scope went larger — pack moved from 'incomplete (37/57 roles), unsigned, no load-time verification' to 'feature-complete (57/57), signed with committed pack.sig, strict load-time verification wired in role-loader at composition root'. That is a 1.0.0 ship-readiness event by any honest reading, not a minor bump. The M41 cascading-cleanup plan referenced in the superseded note is moot — pack.json is 1.0.0 NOW, M36 capability frontmatter will be the next minor (1.1.0), and Phase 6 exit can target 1.x.x without further version reconciliation. NEW BRANCH INVENTORY (also discovered in this session, surfaced for separate scoping by Rocky): the worktree-phase-2-the-org branch holds 4 commits never merged into main — M7 (multi-company workspace + CRUD), M8 (role pack system + 20 stranded roles, NOW LANDED), harmonization (22 role files), and M9 (org chart + hire/fire/promote). The 20 stranded roles are now on main. The OTHER stranded surfaces — WorkspaceSwitcher / CreateCompanyDialog / CompanySettings (M7 UI), OrgChartTree / OrgChartNode / OrgChartView (M9 UI), dropdown-menu Radix primitive, hooks (use-companies / use-roles / use-fire-employee / use-promote-employee / use-set-manager / use-org-chart), org_edges table + repo, employees.fire / promote / setManager backend methods, orgchart.get + companies.create/update IPC channels — appear to NEVER have been replicated on main despite CLAUDE.md M7+M9+M11 claiming complete. Verified by grep: zero orgchart references in renderer, zero org_edges references in main code, ipc/register.ts only registers companies.list + companies.archive (no create/update/delete/orgchart). Bigger than the 20 role files. Needs a Phase 5.6 scoping conversation with Rocky before M36 T2 resumes — options are (a) cherry-pick + adapt with migration renumbering 0001→0013/0002→0014, (b) reimplement on main from scratch, (c) defer indefinitely if Phase 5+ functionality made these obsolete. PROOF OF SHIP for THIS commit: 57 roles index cleanly, 16 role-loader tests pass (added 2 — 57-count + strict-mode signature against real pack), 48 role-schema tests pass (added 22 directory-tree pack-signature tests), full-repo typecheck clean, biome 0 errors, pack.sig committed, end-to-end tamper-detection verified (1-byte ceo.md edit caught with precise tree-hash diagnostic). HOTFIX UNBLOCKS M36 T2.

M36 PREWORK REMEDIATION IN FLIGHT (2026-04-21, Rocky's parallel session — authoritative notes for the ledger when it lands). Scope WIDER than originally planned: Rocky is not just cherry-picking the 20 stranded role.md files; he's also wiring the full pack-signature system end-to-end because it was never actually done in Phase 4 M27. Four deliverables landing in Rocky's session before M36 T2 resumes: (A) CHERRY-PICK COMPLETE — 57 roles now parse cleanly against main's parser with 0 errors. Distribution matches the Phase 2 locked plan exactly: Officer 5, Senior Management 7, Management 8, Supervisor 5, Lead 5, IC 25, System 2 = 57. The 20 stranded files carry slightly older frontmatter shape on-branch, but main's parser is permissive on the drifted fields — parses cleanly as defense-in-depth. No regressions. (B) TREE CANONICALIZATION FORMAT — sorted POSIX-relative paths + per-file SHA-256 concatenated line-by-line into a manifest `<relpath>
<sha256-hex>
<relpath>
<sha256-hex>
...`, the whole manifest hashed once. Includes every file under pack root recursively. Excludes: `pack.sig` (chicken/egg), hidden `.*` files, hard-coded skiplist (node_modules, dist, .git). Deterministic across OS (forward slashes, sorted), human-readable manifest for debugging hash-divergence errors. (C) SIGNATURE FILE FORMAT — JSON not raw base64, for diagnostic value. Shape: `{ version:1, algorithm:'ed25519', publicKeyFingerprint:'sha256:<hex>', treeHash:'sha256:<hex>', signature:'<base64>', signedAt:'<iso8601>' }`. Mismatch errors can point at exactly which hash diverged. (D) KEY HANDLING — one Ed25519 keypair for `strategia-official` pack. Private key to `.secrets/strategia-official.ed25519.pem` (gitignored, Rocky's dev box only). Public key BAKED into `role-loader.ts` as `const STRATEGIA_OFFICIAL_PUBLIC_KEY`. Chain of trust = git history of source code (tampering requires pushing code changes). Rocky captures private key backup obligation (terminal print + vault copy) during generation. (E) DEV WORKFLOW + VERIFY MODE — production builds (`app.isPackaged`): strict, refuse to load on signature mismatch or missing sig. Dev/test (`NODE_ENV !== 'production'`): warn-only on mismatch with clear 'run pnpm sign:pack to re-sign' hint so editing role.md during dev doesn't require per-save re-sign. (F) `pnpm sign:pack` SCRIPT — reads private key from `.secrets/`, recomputes tree hash, writes `pack.sig`. Run before commit + before `pnpm dist`. Impact on M36 T2+T3+ coupled PR: after Rocky's session lands, the pack-signature path is LIVE not latent. My parser changes remain orthogonal (parser validates frontmatter; pack-signature validates tree integrity). Two hard integrations for when I resume: (1) pack.json version bump 0.1.0 → 0.2.0 must trigger `pnpm sign:pack` as part of the verification gate, not just a JSON edit. (2) The 57 backfilled role.md edits change file SHA-256s, so tree hash changes, so pack.sig must be regenerated as the LAST step of the coupled PR (after all role.md edits land). Verify-in-dev mode means the pack can be in warn-state during active backfill and only re-signed at the end. Flag for me: confirm with Rocky whether `pnpm sign:pack` should be run (a) per-commit, (b) once at end of the coupled PR, or (c) automatically via a pre-commit hook.

M36 T2+T3+ PREWORK DISCOVERIES (2026-04-21, during coupled-PR investigation — Rocky resolving the 20-file stranded-state discrepancy in a parallel session before T2 resumes). Four facts ground-truthed against the repo that contradict the plan doc + CLAUDE.md claims, documented here so the next Loki iteration has authoritative numbers: (1) ROLE COUNT — plan doc / CLAUDE.md claim '55 F10 + 2 system = 57 roles'. Actual filesystem scan at investigation time showed 35 F10 + 2 system = 37 files. Rocky isolated the delta as 20 stranded role.md files never committed to the pack: officer (2: coo, cto) + senior-mgmt (3: vp-engineering, vp-product, vp-marketing) + management (3: engineering-manager, product-manager, design-manager) + supervisor (3: tech-lead, qa-lead, devops-lead) + lead (3: staff-engineer, senior-product-manager, design-lead) + ic (6: frontend-developer, backend-developer, ui-ux-designer, qa-engineer, devops-engineer, data-analyst). After Rocky's parallel session lands these 20 files, pack will match the plan doc's '57 roles' claim exactly (officer 5 / senior-mgmt 7 / management 8 / supervisor 5 / lead 5 / ic 25 / system 2). M36 T2+T3+ coupled PR resumes against the FULL 57 once Rocky signals ready. (2) FILE LAYOUT — plan doc prose and CLAUDE.md snippets imply hierarchical naming like 'chief-executive-officer.md' with descriptive paths. Actual layout is FLAT <role-id>.md under the level directory (e.g., roles/officer/ceo.md, not roles/officer/chief-executive-officer.md). The frontmatter id stays canonical ('chief-executive-officer') but the filename is the short id. Backfill MUST preserve the flat filename convention. (3) PACK.JSON VERSION — plan doc §5.7 says baseline is 1.0.0. Actual is 0.1.0 — Phase 4 M27 bumped the six workspace package.json files to 1.0.0 but MISSED role-packs/strategia-official/pack.json (it's a separate manifest, not a workspace member). M36 bump target SHOULD still be semver-minor (additive schema extension), so 0.1.0 → 0.2.0 is the correct call rather than 0.1.0 → 1.1.0 (which would conflate a major bump with the additive intent). Cascading cleanup: after M36, M41 Phase 6 exit should promote pack.json to 1.x.x alongside Team-X v1.2.0 for consistency with workspace packages. Flagging as deferred debt in M41 scope. (4) PACK.SIG — plan doc claims 'role-pack signature re-sign' via M27 pack-signature.ts surface is part of M36 scope. Reality: pack-signature.ts EXISTS (10 passing tests in pack-signature.test.ts), but no signature was EVER generated for the strategia-official pack (no pack.sig file in repo) AND load-time enforcement was never wired into role-loader.ts. M27 shipped the TOOLING but not the SIGN-AND-VERIFY loop. Consequence for M36: no re-sign is required because there's nothing to re-sign. The plan doc's 'Ed25519 re-sign' step is a no-op for M36. Flagging for M41 (or a dedicated follow-up milestone) to actually generate a pack.sig + wire load-time verification. Signing before wiring creates zero value.
